description: Rigolleau S.A. engages in the manufacture and sale of glass products in Argentina and internationally. The company offers household products, such as cups, glasses, beer glasses, chops, coffee jars, bowls, crockery, jugs, and salad bowls, as well as type 1 borosilicate glass ampoules and vials. It also provides food packaging products for sweet and jams, preserves and pickles, and capes; bottle packaging products for oils, beers, juices, spirits and hip flasks, water, and essences; and medicinal packaging products for droppers, liquids and solids, veterinarians, agricultural, and antibiotics. In addition, the company offers a variety of promotional options for product customization. Rigolleau S.A. was founded in 1882 and is based in Berazategui, Argentina.
